pageDescription: Calculate ovulation  with our free online calculator

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides ovulation  estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and should not replace professional advice
Results may vary based on individual factors
Use consistent units for accurate results

messages.enterInformation: Enter the required information to calculate ovulation
messages.resultMessage: Your ovulation  calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides ovulation  estimates based on standard methods. Actual values may vary based on individual circumstances and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized advice and detailed information, consult with professionals who can provide guidance based on individual needs and circumstances.

first_day_of_your_last_period_2: First Day of Your Last Period *
average_menstrual_cycle_length_ranges_fr: Average menstrual cycle length ranges from 22 to 44 days (28 days is typical)
enter_your_cycle_details_to_calculate_yo: Enter your cycle details to calculate your fertile window.
ovulation_typically_occurs_14_days_befor: Ovulation typically occurs 14 days before your next period
the_egg_survives_for_about_1224_hours_af: The egg survives for about 12-24 hours after ovulation
sperm_can_survive_in_the_reproductive_tr: Sperm can survive in the reproductive tract for up to 5 days
the_fertile_window_is_approximately_6_da: The fertile window is approximately 6 days long
slight_increase_in_basal_body_temperatur: Slight increase in basal body temperature
this_calculator_provides_estimates_based: This calculator provides estimates based on average cycles
actual_ovulation_can_vary_by_12_days_51: Actual ovulation can vary by 1-2 days
stress_illness_and_lifestyle_can_affect_: Stress, illness, and lifestyle can affect timing
consult_healthcare_providers_for_fertili: Consult healthcare providers for fertility concerns
